channel.title: Accessibility Review on Mobile A11y
channel.description: Recent content in Accessibility Review on Mobile A11y

item.title: Accessibility Review: Daily Dictionary - Screen changes
item.description: The Accessibility Review series uses real world apps to provide examples of common accessibility issues and provide tips on how to fix them. Each of the developers has kindly volunteered their app to be tested. Daily Dictionary is an app from Benjamin Mayo providing a new word every day with definitions and real-world uses designed to help increase your vocabulary. Assessing the app, I noticed Benjamin has made a design decision around presenting the app’s settings.
